subject: Quick investor check-in this week?
body: Hi Alex — Quick check-in this week? I’d like to touch base on early Q2 progress and any board-prep items. I’m flexible most afternoons CEST. 45 minutes should do. - Maria

subject: 60-min demo Friday 15:30 CEST?
body: Hi Alex, Nimbus Metrics can streamline your data pipelines. Could we schedule a 60-minute demo this Friday at 15:30 CEST? Happy to show a full walkthrough.

subject: Could we move our 1:1?
constraints: Prefer Tue late afternoon or Wed after 13:00.
body: Hey Alex — A critical deploy may conflict with our Tue 14:00 1:1. Can we move it to later Tue afternoon or sometime Wed after 13:00? Thanks!

subject: Q2 Board Meeting — propose Thu Apr 23, 16:00–17:30 CEST
body: Hi Alex, proposing the Q2 Board Meeting for Thursday, Apr 23, 16:00–17:30 CEST via Zoom. Agenda: Q1 actuals, Q2 forecast, product roadmap, hiring. Please confirm and send any materials by Wed EOD. — James (for Maria)

subject: Speaker coordination call — Mon 09:30?
body: Hi Alex, can we do a quick speaker logistics call for Madrid Tech Summit at 09:30 on Monday? We’ll cover AV, stage timing, and travel. Thanks!
